message.content:
The image displays a minimalistic page with the following elements:  

- **Text Label**: At the top, there is a plain text label reading *"Sample 3 :"* (with a space after the colon).  
- **Hyperlink**: Directly below the label, there is a blue, underlined hyperlink with the URL: `https://drive.google.com/file/d/157Jppv4e_9QpQ7agpirB9Md0oxJlmUzG/view?usp=share_link`. This link appears to be a Google Drive file-sharing link.  

The page has no other visible content, such as form fields, additional labels, or sections. The background is white, and the text/hyperlink are centered or left-aligned (depending on the page layout) with ample whitespace around them.
